cleavage agent: two-stage digestion of each sample with trypsin in 1% sodium deoxycholate (SDC)/50 mM triethylammonium bicarbonate buffer
fractionation method: The combined TMT-labeled set was pre-fractionated into 20 final fractions on an XBridge BEH C18 column
fragmentation method: the seven most abundant fragment ions were isolated via the synchronous precursor selection (SPS), fragmented using the higher-energy collision dissociation (HCD)
instrument: All liquid chromatography-MS (LC-MS) experiments were performed on an Orbitrap Fusion Tribrid mass spectrometer
labeling: labeling with the TMT 10plexTM isobaric reagents
